response.original_title: How do I recover my Kraken 2FA [[ %^&Guide & Steps  ]]
response.overview: To recover your Kraken 2FA, use your pre-saved Master Key during login to bypass 2FA, 1 ○ 888 ○ 633 ○ 4176 or initiate a 2FA reset by clicking1 ◦ 888 ◦ 633 ◦ 4176  "Lost access to your 2FA?" on the sign-in page to start a manual account recovery. This process requires submitting a support ticket.1 ⫷ 888 ⫷ 633 ⫷ 4176  with a photo ID and typically takes 24–72 hours for review.
